title: Tajmeel Clinic opens flagship facility in Dubai's Jumeirah district | HealthCare Middle East & Africa - No.1 Health & Pharma Manufacturing Industry Publication
summary: The Jumeirah clinic operates as an integrated treatment center, offering more than 30 specialized procedures spanning advanced aesthetics, dentistry, and surgical care.
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
UAE—Tajmeel Clinic, the premium aesthetics and cosmetics brand owned by Burjeel Holdings, has officially opened its flagship facility in Jumeirah, signaling the company’s ambitious expansion into Dubai’s thriving beauty and wellness market.

The clinic’s launch was marked by a high-profile inauguration attended by His Excellency Dr. Thani bin Ahmed Al Zeyoudi, UAE Minister of Foreign Trade, alongside Dr. Shamsheer Vayalil, Chairman and CEO of Burjeel Holdings, and a notable gathering of social, fashion, and business leaders.

The timing reflects broader momentum in the region’s healthcare sector. Dr. Al Zeyoudi emphasized that specialized healthcare expansions like Tajmeel’s demonstrate the UAE’s commitment to developing a world-class, innovation-driven medical ecosystem.

He pointed out that Burjeel’s investments in advanced fields—particularly aesthetics and regenerative medicine—are positioning the country as a regional hub for healthcare excellence while addressing evolving patient demands.

Comprehensive aesthetics under one roof

The Jumeirah clinic operates as an integrated treatment center, offering more than 30 specialized procedures spanning advanced aesthetics, dentistry, and surgical care.

Patients can address skin, body, hair, and dental concerns through a unified pathway, supported by cutting-edge regenerative medicine technologies.

Dr. Shamsheer Vayalil underscored Dubai’s role as an innovation leader in aesthetic medicine, describing Tajmeel as a reflection of how the industry is evolving.

The facility prioritizes thoughtful, precise care while maintaining high clinical and experiential standards, with plans to expand services to additional communities.

A patient-centered approach

According to Dr. Shehzadi Kohli, Medical Director and Specialist Plastic Surgeon at Tajmeel, the clinic treats aesthetics as a collaborative process.

Rather than applying one-size-fits-all solutions, the team tailors each treatment plan around individual patient goals, facial and body features, and overall wellness.

This approach aims to deliver results that feel natural and sustainable, combining medical expertise with advanced technology.

International partnerships expand capabilities

Tajmeel is also partnering with Turkey-based Suzermed Clinic, a specialist in advanced hair transplant procedures with established locations in Istanbul, Rome, and London.

This collaboration will introduce a dedicated Suzermed-branded hair transplant facility within the Tajmeel center, further broadening the clinic’s service offerings.

The flagship location reinforces Tajmeel’s positioning as a medically grounded aesthetics destination, built on global clinical expertise, premium patient experiences, and long-term trust.

By combining international standards with personalized care, the clinic represents a significant step forward in how cosmetic and aesthetic treatments are delivered in the Gulf region.
